Skip to content
AI Proxy logging dashboard
Stream Dashboard Schema

Provider-compatible gateway

Route model calls and coding-agent sessions through one place.

This proxy captures OpenAI and Anthropic API traffic, logs token usage, latency, and attribution to SQLite, and surfaces coaching signals for developer tool sessions.

Health Checking…
Mode SQLite logging
Routes /openai · /anthropic · /tool-events
Total requests — all time
Input tokens — total logged
Avg first token — latency signal
Coaching signals — tool sessions flagged

Production shape

Provider logs plus tool-session events

Use provider request records for authoritative token usage, then join tool events from Claude Code and Codex by user, team, app, repo, session, and timestamp. 

id · timestamp · provider · model · user_id · team_id
stream · duration_ms · first_token_ms
input_tokens · output_tokens · cached_tokens
request_summary · response_summary · error

tool · event_type · session_id · cwd · repo
prompt_summary · command · files · metadata
coaching_signals[] · severity · evidence
